CustomField.description: Used only when Product_Scope_Type__c = Specific Products. Comma-separated list of Product2.Name values populated by the promoSpecificProductPicker LWC. The picker filters out IsActive = false products and shows Product Code alongside Product Name in the search results so staff can disambiguate, but the persisted CSV is names — matches the allocation engine. OrderItems whose Product2.Name is in the list are eligible.
CustomField.label: Specific Products
